data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet, exactly 2 rows by 2 columns with 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Background must be 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key only, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines.

Subject: training dummy enemy for Samsara Ascension — a straw and wood practice puppet with red cloth talisman strips, a simple round target mark on the torso, short wooden arms, compact readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Framing: full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame. Subject fills about 58% to 66% of each cell with generous magenta margin.

Animation: combat sequence with real pose changes across four frames. Keep the exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/core face, costume marks, material language, and overall design in every cell. Only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, cloth strips, weapon/focus angle, and tiny attached aura may change.

Frame order:
1) top-left: attack wind-up / casting wind-up — body crouches or coils, focus/energy pulls close.
2) top-right: compact strike / snap forward — body lunges or snaps forward, effects stay tight and attached.
3) bottom-left: follow-through — clear recoil with cloth momentum, no wide detached effect.
4) bottom-right: guard / recovery pose — ready to loop back into combat.

Containment: the entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, crisp readable silhouette, subdued but vivid palette suitable for a game enemy, consistent lighting, minimal attached aura only, no text, no labels, no numbers, no UI, no watermark, no extra characters, no cropped body parts, no inconsistent scale, no redesign, no alternate form.
